{{Quote|You risk war between Isht and Coruscant, ''[…]'' You have until I reach you to cease this action and return this vessel to my command.|Av'muru|<ref name="Specter">''[[Specter of the Past]]''</ref>}}
'''Isht''' was the [[Ishori]] homeworld. It was directly represented in the [[New Republic Senate/Legends|New Republic Senate]].

{{Planet-stub}}
